name: Summarize async workloads docs
prompt: write a concise summary to summary.md covering what Netlify's async workloads are, key features, and setup steps.

judge.check: Agent wrote summary.md with substantive content
Summary covers what async workloads are and their key features

setup.command: { echo '## Setup'; echo; echo "- Phase: **${AXIS_PHASE}**"; echo "- Workspace: \`${AXIS_WORKSPACE}\`"; echo "- Started: $(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; echo; echo '### Pre-existing files'; echo; if [ -z "$(ls -A "$AXIS_WORKSPACE")" ]; then echo '_workspace is empty_'; else ls -la "$AXIS_WORKSPACE" | sed 's/^/    /'; fi; } >> "$AXIS_OUTPUT"

teardown.command: { echo '## Teardown'; echo; echo "- Finished: $(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; echo; echo '### Files left in workspace'; echo; if [ -f "$AXIS_WORKSPACE/summary.md" ]; then bytes=$(wc -c < "$AXIS_WORKSPACE/summary.md" | tr -d ' '); lines=$(wc -l < "$AXIS_WORKSPACE/summary.md" | tr -d ' '); echo '| file | bytes | lines |'; echo '| --- | ---: | ---: |'; echo "| \`summary.md\` | $bytes | $lines |"; echo; echo '### First line preview'; echo; echo "> $(head -n 1 "$AXIS_WORKSPACE/summary.md")"; else echo '_no summary.md was written_'; fi; } >> "$AXIS_OUTPUT"

variants.name: alt-prompt
variants.prompt: Fetch the documentation page at https://docs.netlify.com/build/async-workloads/overview/ and write a concise summary to summary.md covering what async workloads are, key features, and setup steps.
